reviews.text: I would look no further because this is the best photographer by far! Sarah was astounding! Her prices are extremely reasonable, she is willing to go the extra mile to making sure everyone is satisfied and happy, and she will help in anyway she can on your special day. I got the silver package that included our engagement session photos which me and my husband are extremely happy with how they turned out. The day of the wedding, I was running late from the hair and makeup salon and when Sarah arrived when we weren't there, she got right to work taking pictures of the dress and wedding shoes. She is incredibly talented, very good at instructing those who are not photogenic, has extreme integrity, and extremely personable and easy to talk to. I would highly recommend her for any photo shoot!!

We contacted Sarah only a month before our wedding, when our original photographer had a family emergency and had to cancel. She was amazing! Great communication right from the jump, and she had us laughing the entire day. And very reasonably priced for the quality and service she provides! Turnaround on getting our photos back was very quick, and they are just beautiful. Thank you so much, Sarah!!

Absolutely incredible photographer. Not only are the images absolutely stunning, but she made getting them fun and effortless. As a bride I wanted to minimize anything I “had to do” which included endless staged pictures. She made sure to keep everything moving quickly and efficiently while also making sure to get all the shots I’d be so grateful to have down the road. Truly couldn’t recommend her more for any type of photography needs you may have!

Sarah was our phenomenal photographer for our one of a kind wedding!!! She is splendidly professional, has an exquisite eye & talent to say the least, loaded with joy. She knew just what to say to capture the absolute best guided candid photos. She was nonstop movement. Continuous clever jokes to keep the smiles & laughter flowing. Our venue is a historical house so naturally there will be unique areas for pictures. But what could have easily been over looked was the many challenges & adjustments she neutralized dauntlessly. She was thoroughly prepared with an array of lenses, flashes, lights, ideas, & confidence. She helped us majorly with our timeline for our day of. She glows with an amicable nature which went in hand marvelously with her flexible plan on the day of. Her prices are truly out of this world fair. The quality deserves a dedicated fanfare, without a doubt. Each picture could be the cover of a couture bridal magazine. And all the other pictures could comprise the whole magazine entirely and without aid. When we opened the album of all the photographs she took, we were speechless at the quantity and excellence! In every conceivable way, Sarah; simply put, IS 5 solid gold stars!!! Inside & out, start to finish, head to toe, through & through. She is an unparalleled photographer, woman, & new friend.

My family has used Sarah for family pictures and also for my son’s senior pictures. I am currently planning my wedding, so without hesitation, I reached out to Sarah once again. I love her whimsical style and creative eye. As an artist myself, I’m very particular and recognize good art when I see it. Initially, we were only planning to have Sarah take pictures at the wedding, but she convinced us otherwise! I’m so glad she did! Our engagement pictures were perfect and captured us truly as the couple we are in the environment we love so much—the mountains. We can’t wait to have her be part of our big day!
